data.body: AC amendment (Gap: implicit_assumption): Tests must reference the same tag constant names as figma-resync.py will use from figma-tags.conf. Define TEST_TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW = 'design:awaiting_review' (or import from constants) at top of test file — do not hardcode the string in individual test assertions. Add AC: 'test_figma_resync.py defines or imports tag constants matching figma-tags.conf values'. Verify: grep -q 'TAG_AWAITING_REVIEW\|awaiting_review' tests/unit/test_figma_resync.py
